text: R&D investment intensity remained elevated at 8.09% of revenue in Q4 2026, with R&D expenses totaling $5,512,000,000 [1562353d-db39-4a2f-b994-c550365403ac][7d0701ad-9c93-41dc-a668-c80da89edf75]. This level of R&D spending relative to revenue indicates NVIDIA's continued commitment to maintaining technological leadership in AI chips and data center solutions. The absolute R&D spend increased from $3,989,000,000 in Q1 to $5,512,000,000 in Q4, reflecting scaled investment alongside revenue growth [e937267f-ef09-459a-b5a9-972db6375197][1562353d-db39-4a2f-b994-c550365403ac].

issues.offending_span: reflecting scaled investment alongside revenue growth
issues.explanation: The paragraph claims R&D spending increased 'alongside revenue growth,' but the cited chunks (1562353d-db39-4a2f-b994-c550365403ac and e937267f-ef09-459a-b5a9-972db6375197) only contain R&D expense figures for Q4 and Q1 respectively. No revenue data is provided in the cited chunks to substantiate the revenue growth claim. While the calculation result shows Q4 revenue of $68,127,000,000, Q1 revenue is not cited to confirm growth occurred.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite additional chunks containing Q1 revenue data to support the revenue growth claim, or rephrase to state 'reflecting scaled investment' without referencing revenue growth, or add a citation to revenue data if available in other chunks.
